scripts.name: Blend Tool
scripts.description: Select 2 vector objects, then run. Supports path as 3rd object.
scripts.author: robinsnest56

scripts.name: Markdown import to text frame
scripts.description: Markdown import to text frame
scripts.author: rabidgremlin

scripts.name: Hello, World Example
scripts.description: Affinity scripting Hello, World!
scripts.author: rabidgremlin

scripts.name: Copy to artboards
scripts.description: Duplicates selected object(s) onto every other artboard in the document
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Swap objects by center
scripts.description: Swap the locations of two selected objects by their center points.
scripts.author: daani-rika

scripts.name: Smart JPEG export
scripts.description: Exports all/selected artboards, spreads or docs with max. size limit
scripts.author: JiriKrblich

scripts.name: Single-char linebreak fix
scripts.description: Replaces spaces after lone single characters with non-breaking spaces (Slavic languages)
scripts.author: JiriKrblich

scripts.name: Genarate Crop Marks
scripts.description: Automatically generate 5mm corner crops and internal grid ticks with a 2mm offset for any selection in Affinity, placing them on a dedicated 0.25pt locked production layer.
scripts.author: sakura

scripts.name: Custom Gradient Map
scripts.description: Creates a custom gradient map based on a selected gradient swatch.
scripts.author: RE4LLY

scripts.name: Zig Zag Effect
scripts.description: This script transforms a selected shape or line into a zig zag pattern. Simply select a shape or path, run the script, and it will automatically apply a zig zag effect to it.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Bento Box Generator
scripts.description: Generates Bento Grid/Box on the current page/artboard
scripts.author: JiriKrblich

scripts.name: ReplaceColorFill
scripts.description: Allows users to quickly change the fill color/gradients of selected shapes.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Hanging chars and prepositions
scripts.description: Replaces spaces after lone single characters or prepositions with non-breaking spaces (for slavic languages). Based on initial script by JiriKrblich
scripts.author: nodeus

scripts.name: RGB Finder
scripts.description: Looks for all embedded and linked RGB images in an open Affinity document. Useful for CMYK documents.
scripts.author: hrum

scripts.name: Dithering
scripts.description: Adjustable halftone dithering effect with 12 dithering algorithms.
scripts.author: bitmancer

scripts.name: ReplaceStrokeColor
scripts.description: Allows users to quickly change the stroke color or gradients of selected shapes.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: PuckerBloatEffect
scripts.description: Applies a Pucker & Bloat effect to the selected object(s), pulling anchor points inward (Pucker) or outward (Bloat) to distort
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: RadialRepeat
scripts.description: Creates a radial repeat from the selected object(s) by duplicating the selection evenly around a central point in a circular pattern.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: DeleteEmptyGroups
scripts.description: Deletes empty groups left behind by the user.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Randomize Objects
scripts.description: Randomization of size, position, rotation, skew, opacity, color, and stroke of selected objects.
scripts.author: zaum

scripts.name: Directional Blur Shadow
scripts.description: Directional Blur Shadow creates a directional shadow of an object that progressively blurs, fades and tapers as it moves away from the object.
scripts.author: rbonelli

scripts.name: OKLCH Color
scripts.description: Edit, paste and save OKLCH colors.
scripts.author: JiriKrblich

scripts.name: Split to grid
scripts.description: Split vector object into n*n grid
scripts.author: JiriKrblich

scripts.name: Crack and Explode
scripts.description: Create radial cracks in the shape and explode it.
scripts.author: rbonelli

scripts.name: Distribute Shapes on Paths
scripts.description: Places copies of designated target layers along selected vector shapes or paths. Choose the target layer by name from the dropdown or rename it to target. Multiple matching layers are distributed in round-robin order. Supports vector, group, symbol, and pixel layers, with insertion modes for path, center, nodes, and corners.
scripts.author: EricP

scripts.name: ReplaceAllwithKeyObject
scripts.description: The script replaces all selected objects with duplicates of the key object (select 2 objects then press Option on Mac or Alt on Windows on the object you want to become the key object), while preserving position and rotation, with optional size matching.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Swap Orientation Only
scripts.description: The script swaps the position and rotation of 2 selected objects or groups, while keeping their size unchanged. Select exactly 2 objects or groups, then run the script.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: SeparateFill&Stroke
scripts.description: Separates combined fill and stroke appearances into independent objects for easier editing and output control.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Arrange on Path
scripts.description: Distributes selected objects evenly along auto-detected vector paths, with support for multiple paths, randomization, interpolation, smart sorting, open/closed paths, and repeat mode for tiling objects along the path.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Swap Objects
scripts.description: The script swaps selected objects based on a custom mapping, with optional orientation and dimension swapping. Select at least 2 objects, choose how they should swap in the dialog, then use Preview or Apply.
scripts.author: BlackMortimer-13

scripts.name: Toggle Layer Visibility Across All Pages
scripts.description: Layer States alternative. Select a layer, then run this script. It reads the layer's name and current visibility, then toggles all layers with the same name across every page/spread.
scripts.author: hrum

scripts.name: Move Layer to Top Across All Pages
scripts.description: Select a layer, then run this script. It finds all layers with the same name across every page/spread and moves them to the top of the layer stack.
scripts.author: hrum
